info.title: AI Tutor Platform API
info.description: Multi-Agent AI Tutor Platform with FastAPI and MySQL

post.description: Refresh access token using refresh token.

get.description: Get current authenticated user info.

post.description: Create a new course using the Initialize Agent.

get.description: Get all courses for the current user.
Get a specific course by ID.

put.description: Update a course plan by using prompt and AI.

post.description: Create lessons from course_plan using AI extraction.

schema.title: Response Install Course Plan Courses  Course Id  Install Post

get.description: Get all lessons for a specific course.

schema.title: Response Get Course Lessons Courses  Course Id  Lessons Get

get.description: Generate and return a certificate for a completed course.
Get a specific lesson by ID. Generates content if missing.
Mark a lesson as complete and generate quizzes for evaluation.

schema.title: Response Complete Lesson Lessons  Lesson Id  Complete Get

get.description: Get all interactions for a lesson.

schema.title: Response Get Lesson Interactions Lessons  Lesson Id  Interactions Get

post.description: Create a new interaction for a lesson where TutorAgent answers a student question.

get.description: Get all quizzes for a lesson.

schema.title: Response Get Lesson Quizzes Lessons  Lesson Id  Quizzes Get

get.description: Get all progress records for a lesson.

schema.title: Response Get Lesson Progress Lessons  Lesson Id  Progress Get

get.description: Get all flashcards for a lesson.

schema.title: Response Get Lesson Flashcards Lessons  Lesson Id  Flashcards Get
